title: Partition pruning does not consider session timezone correctly for datetime-based partition keys
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE default.test_partition(dtkey DATETIME, a INT, b VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO default.test_partition VALUES (CAST('2025-09-03 02:58:00' AS DATETIME), 1, 'test1');
SELECT dtkey FROM default.test_partition WHERE dtkey >= CAST('2025-09-03 00:00:00' AS DATETIME) AND dtkey < CAST('2025-09-03 05:00:00' AS DATETIME);
key_bug_features: Partition pruning ignores session timezone for datetime keys
